emptySectionFilter: No block matches this section filter.
statusTipVal: menu: `/` · section: `f` · language & theme in top bar
typewriterReady: > Ready. Pick a section or search.
gitGame.blockSubtitle: Retro mini-games to drill commands — no repo required.
gitGame.incorrect: ✗ Not quite — check the docs above.
gitGame.seqInstruction: Tap the commands in the order you’d run to ship a tiny fix.
gitGame.branchCanvasLabel: Commit graph · squares = commits · glowing = HEAD
gitGame.levelLocked: Locked — finish all drills on the previous level.
gitGame.levelStatus: Level {{n}} — complete quiz, sequence & branch to unlock the next.
gitGame.modeHint: Missions use guided questions. Terminal lab lets you type git-like commands while the 8-bit board shows worktree → index → HEAD.
gitGame.terminalHint: Try git status, then git add README.md, git commit -m "your message". Type help for the list.
gitGame.vizLegend: Orange = modified file · cyan glow = staged · right column = latest commit + branch
gitTerm.welcome: Sandbox online. Small command subset only — see Help.
gitTerm.clean: nothing to commit, working tree clean (sim)
gitTerm.helpBody:
Commands (simulated):
  git status
  git add <file> | git add .
  git restore --staged <file>
  git commit -m "message"
  git log
  git branch | git branch <name>
  git switch <name> | git checkout <name>
Also: help, clear (or Clear log button), Reset sandbox.
gitTerm.errUnknown: Only git-prefixed commands are simulated here.
gitTerm.errAlreadyClean: File is already clean in the sim.
gitTerm.okUnstaged: Unstaged {{file}} (still modified on disk in the sim).
gitTerm.errBranchMissing: That branch does not exist here.
gitTerm.errNotImpl: Command not implemented in the sandbox — see Help.
